# hfo

> Fullscreen terminal UI and headless CLI that turns any Hugging Face GGUF
> repository into a running, hardware-tuned Ollama model — in one Enter
> keystroke. Cross-OS (Windows · macOS · Linux). Strict TypeScript. MIT.
> No telemetry, no accounts, no subscriptions. Version 0.1.0.

hfo (`hfo-cli` on npm) scores every quant in a Hugging Face repo against your
detected VRAM and RAM, parses the model card for recommended sampling
parameters, and auto-generates a tuned Modelfile before registering the
model with the local Ollama daemon. Every TUI capability ships a headless
`--flag` equivalent so the same pipeline runs from CI, cron, or an editor
plugin.

## Docs

- [Home](https://hfo.carrillo.app/): overview, hero, install options
- [Install](https://hfo.carrillo.app/install/): npm, pnpm, yarn, bun, curl, PowerShell, standalone binaries
- [CLI reference](https://hfo.carrillo.app/cli/): every flag, headless equivalent of each TUI capability
- [Keyboard shortcuts](https://hfo.carrillo.app/keyboard/): every hotkey across every tab
- [FAQ](https://hfo.carrillo.app/faq/): most-asked questions (pricing, OS, Ollama, agents, storage)
- [Privacy](https://hfo.carrillo.app/privacy/): no telemetry — the two HF endpoints hfo calls, and nothing else
- [Benchmarks](https://hfo.carrillo.app/benchmarks/): run `hfo --bench <tag>` for tok/s + TTFT; submission format for the community leaderboard
